text.name: rl_bridge_drakeAdultDesc
text.text: An adult drake. Drakes that are healthy and older than 6 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_ganderAdultDesc
text.text: An adult gander. Ganders that are healthy and older than 10 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_tomcatAdultDesc
text.text: An adult tomcat. Tomcats that are healthy and older than 8 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_alpacaWhiteMaleAdultDesc
text.text: An adult white male alpaca. Males that are healthy and older than 8 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_alpacaBrownMaleAdultDesc
text.text: An adult brown male alpaca. Males that are healthy and older than 8 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_alpacaBlackMaleAdultDesc
text.text: An adult black male alpaca. Males that are healthy and older than 8 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_alpacaGreyMaleAdultDesc
text.text: An adult grey male alpaca. Males that are healthy and older than 8 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_duckwildMaleAdultDesc
text.text: An adult wild drake. Drakes that are healthy and older than 6 months can reproduce.

text.name: rl_bridge_quailMaleAdultDesc
text.text: An adult male quail. Males that are healthy and older than 6 months can reproduce.
